args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
python3 - "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
obj = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
wave_ids = [wave['wave_index'] for wave in obj['waves']]
assert wave_ids == sorted(wave_ids), wave_ids
assert all(wave['node_names'] for wave in obj['waves'])
assert obj['nodes']
PY
printf 'explore-materialization-wave-order\n'
